SYNTHETIC FIXTURE - NOT A RECORDED DEED. For parser testing only.

Part of the Northwest Quarter of Section 22, Township 14 North, Range 1 West,
Hendricks County, Indiana, described as:

Beginning at the Northwest corner of said Quarter Section;

thence North 89 degrees 30 minutes 00 seconds East, 600.00 feet;
thence South 00 degrees 30 minutes 00 seconds East, 250.00 feet;
thence North 89 degrees 30 minutes 00 seconds East, 200.00 feet;
thence South 00 degrees 30 minutes 00 seconds East, 250.00 feet;
thence South 89 degrees 30 minutes 00 seconds West, 800.00 feet;
thence North 00 degrees 30 minutes 00 seconds West, 250.00 feet;
thence North 00 degrees 30 minutes 00 seconds West, 250.00 feet to the Point
of Beginning.
